message:
feat(fcp-core): add OperationStatus enum (Pending/Running/Completed/Failed) + serde-matrix pinning

Implements bead flywheel_connectors-8duqk ("OperationStatus serde tag
matrix"). Adds the public OperationStatus enum the bead asked for and
pins its on-the-wire form.

Production change (crates/fcp-core/src/operation.rs):

- New `pub enum OperationStatus` placed in its own section header
  comment block ("Operation Status (public operation lifecycle)")
  alongside the existing IntentStatus block. Four variants
  representing the documented operation lifecycle:
  * Pending   — accepted but not started
  * Running   — currently running
  * Completed — completed successfully
  * Failed    — failed
- Derives Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize
  so it slots into both fast hot-path branching and JSON / CBOR
  receipts. (No Hash derive intentionally — operation status is not
  a HashMap key in any current consumer; can be added when a real
  call site needs it.)

Pinning test (crates/fcp-core/tests/operation_status_serde_tags.rs,
new):

- OperationStatusCase fixture binds each variant to its canonical
  JSON tag and the deterministic CBOR hex byte sequence the
  ciborium encoder emits.
- Asserts JSON round-trip (the on-the-wire tag is exactly the
  expected string) and CBOR round-trip (the bytes are exactly the
  pinned hex). Adding a variant means appending one row;
  renaming one is a hard test failure.

Re-export added so `OperationStatus` is reachable as
`fcp_core::OperationStatus`, matching how the test imports it.

Beads sync: rolls in the 8duqk in_progress → closed transition the
parallel agent emitted as part of the same landing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
